英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: 英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Bradford-Wetewode於1356年出生在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Robert Wetewode21歲，母親Agnes de Bradford18歲。他於大約1373年與Agnes Wetewode在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1447年在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年91歲。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Bradford-Wetewode was born in 1356, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, his father, Robert Wetewode, was 21 and his mother, Agnes de Bradford, was 18. He married Agnes Wetewode about 1373, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1447, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Bradford-Wetewode est né en 1356, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert Wetewode, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Bradford, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Wetewode environ 1373, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1447, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

Lui sposato Agnes Wetewode circa 1373, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トイン
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Bradford-Wetewodeが1356年にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Robert Wetewodeは21歳，母Agnes de Bradfordは18歳であった。約1373年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでAgnes Wetewodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1447年にイギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Bradford-Wetewode(이)가 1356년 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Wetewode(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Bradford(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Agnes Wetewode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bradford-Wetewode nasceu em 1356, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Wetewode, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Bradford, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Wetewode aproximadamente 1373, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1447, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos.

ru.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Bradford-Wetewode родился в 1356 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Wetewode было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Bradford, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Wetewode около 1373 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1447 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Bradford-Wetewode nació en 1356, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Wetewode, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes de Bradford, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnes Wetewode aproximadamente 1373, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1447, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años.
